purpose: Declares the CURRENT phase and its slices as DATA, so the owner milestone-update generator (scripts/new-milestone-update.ps1) can compute a REAL '% complete' = done slices / total, never an invented number. A slice counts as done ONLY if it carries non-empty 'evidence' (a PR number, commit SHA, or doc pointer) — flipping 'done' without a checkable artifact is a defect the generator refuses (reports UNKNOWN). Owner-legible on purpose: this is the phase map. Update it as slices land; keep 'evidence' pointing at something real.

phase.name: Operational Trust Qualification & Adoption
phase.tagline: the final phase — prove PCC well enough that the owner signs off he trusts it

slice_note: Slices = the 22 audit categories named explicitly in ADR-0009 (an audit category is 'done' when its per-practice grid is populated AND independently verified), plus the two sign-off gates. The category list is the current declared plan; some may consolidate (ADR-0009 point 1) — adjust here when they do, so the denominator always reflects the real plan.

slices.title: State & data integrity
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/state-data-integrity.md (Codex-verified); 2 real T0 test-gaps CLOSED — backup.spec.js (7) + check-schemas.spec.js (4); failure-injection-in-CI disclosed as accepted residue

slices.title: Verification & proof-of-done
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/verification-proof-of-done.md (Codex-verified); mostly tested-holds (earned by real past failures); built the ONE bar-clearing control: scripts/check-branch-protection.ps1 (+7 tests) converting O1 from owner-assertion to a live-checked fact (ran live → PASS); fixed a stale test-count in PROJECT.md

slices.title: Change governance & decisions
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/change-governance-decisions.md (Codex-verified). FOUND A REAL BREAK -> built the regression lock: check-adr.ps1 is T0 (gates every commit + CI) but had ZERO tests, and ADR-0000 claimed it was 'proven to bite' via a one-time manual demo never captured as a test (self-certified-not-regression-locked anti-pattern) -> built app/tests/scripts/check-adr.spec.js (8, red-biting) pinning PASS-on-valid + FAIL on every defect class. The 'ADR-not-required' + rollout-is-prose gaps are DELIBERATE accepted-residues (mechanizing significance = over-governance/fake-intelligence). Travels to spawned projects

slices.title: Requirements / intent & acceptance correctness
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/requirements-intent-acceptance.md (Codex-verified). Accepted-residue by DELIBERATE decision (ADR-0003): the intent->spec->AC->test chain is prose-not-machinery on purpose (owner-approved; a spec pipeline is 'the trap that burned CCB'). Enforced 'done' gate binds to execution-proof-of-diff, NOT to the owner's acceptance criteria -> a worker can build the wrong thing and pass every automated gate. Named as a residual risk for owner active-acceptance; backstop is human (verifier judging intent + owner + gate b). No control built (would re-litigate ADR-0003 + over-govern)

slices.title: Honesty & anti-fake-green
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/honesty-anti-fake-green.md; confirmed the 3 metric-honesty soft-spot fixes hold + are test-pinned (detectors.spec.js, authority.spec.js); attack found the ONE bar-clearing gap: the phase-progress %-complete meter (scripts/new-milestone-update.ps1 — the number gating the owner's sign-off) had 0 tests on its fail-closed logic -> built app/tests/scripts/milestone-generator.spec.js (12 tests, CI-run) pinning every defense to UNKNOWN. Independent verification recorded in this work's Verified-Receipt trailer, not self-claimed

slices.title: Execution authority & worker safety
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/execution-authority-worker-safety.md; attacked persuadable-bypass — controls hold; found+built the ONE gap: read-only deny-list had 0 tests → extracted app/authority-tool-profile.js + authority-tool-profile.spec.js (7) pinning it; fixed a misnaming comment; forceBuild + forged-store disclosed. Independent verification is recorded in this commit's Verified-Receipt trailer (not self-claimed here)

slices.title: Bypass evidence & tamper-detection
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/bypass-evidence-tamper-detection.md; deterministic trail half tested-holds (ledgers git-staged/auditable, CI trailer audit FAILs forged/missing/mismatched). Found+fixed the ONE gap on the owner-visible half: the linchpin (branch protection) was silently non-functional (check-branch-protection.ps1 used Get-Command gh but gh is off PATH -> always UNKNOWN) AND unsurfaced -> added Resolve-Gh fallback (fallback path now exercised: reaches the GitHub API instead of always-UNKNOWN; returns PASS on this authenticated machine, UNKNOWN when unauthenticated -- fail-closed) + wired it into the release gate as a required fail-closed check (run-release-gate.ps1 + schema + release-gate.spec.js: linchpin FAIL->gate FAIL, UNKNOWN->gate UNKNOWN). Independent verification is carried by this commit's Verified-Receipt trailer (verifier=codex exec), which the CI audit re-checks — the durable proof, not a claim self-made in this file

slices.title: Privacy, secrets & access control
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/privacy-secrets-access-control.md (FULL; Codex-verified) + earlier probe docs/audit/privacy-secrets-probe.md (fixed the .env fake-green). Core sound: PCC holds NO secrets of its own (API-key scrub main.js:186, verified), personal content git-ignored/no history leak, cross-project isolation fail-closed (project_mismatch). Two absences disclosed as owner-decision residues (NOT fake-greens): no write-path redaction (honest local-first boundary; auto-redaction=guessing, forbidden by principle) + no commit-time secret scanner (prior-art gitleaks; owner-gated new dep, speculative-for-spawned-projects). No control built

slices.title: Backup & recovery
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/backup-recovery.md (PR #29, Codex-verified). Tested-holds: backup.spec.js (7) re-run green this session incl. restore-aborts-before-any-change on a bad snapshot + fail-closed on missing manifest/point; live dogfood restore point 20260716-042828 (104 files); honest backup tiers travel (scaffold-kit.spec.js). No control built — restore-point discipline disclosed as prose-not-enforced with a reasoned no-gate decision

slices.title: Recovery, rollback & damage-repair behavior
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/recovery-rollback-damage-repair.md (PR #29, Codex-verified). Tested-holds (most-proven area): state-journal.spec.js (6) + atomic-store.test.js (16) re-run green this session — interrupted writes self-heal, corrupt-current serves last-good/blocks mutations, no-valid-generation fails closed; rollback reversible via restore point + branch protection. No control built

slices.title: Testing & assurance
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/testing-assurance.md (Codex-verified). Tested-holds (strong): independent grep found ZERO dishonest tests (no .only/.skip/.fixme/.todo/empty/always-pass across ~70 files); CI runs the FULL suite (test:unit node:test + guarded npm test + lint + npm audit); run-guarded provably can't turn a hang/abort into green (guarded.spec.js); mutation+failure proofs refuse to count a crash as a kill/containment. On-demand-proofs residue cross-refs state-data-integrity (already disclosed). No control built

slices.title: Detection & signals
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/detection-signals.md (Codex-verified). FOUND A REAL BREAK -> built the minimum control: detect-bloat.ps1 was the ONE config-driven detector missing the empty/malformed-config guard its siblings have -> a malformed or nothing-declared bloat-thresholds.json painted 'clear' over ZERO files checked (green-over-unchecked; reproduced live pre-fix). Fixed with malformed->unknown + nothing-declared->unknown guards (incl. the @($null).Count===1 PowerShell trap) + 2 new red-proven tests in detectors.spec.js (17/17 green). Travels to spawned projects. Sycophancy-nudge green-over-unevaluated disclosed as lower-consequence residue

slices.title: Incident response, diagnostics & supportability
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/incident-response-diagnostics.md (Codex-verified). FOUND A REAL BREAK -> BUILT the minimum control: security-relevant app failures were swallowed with ZERO trace (no-swallowed-failures violation) and there was no app-level error log. Built app/error-log.js (append-only, never-throws; error-log.test.js 6) + rerouted the 3 worst main.js swallows (authority-store.write/importScaffoldedInbox/chat-summary.mirror) from silent to durable trace + doctor.ps1 'App errors' WARN surface + gitignored the log. App boots green (ipc.spec.js 27). Forensic-bundle capture disclosed as accepted-residue (build if/when needed)

slices.title: Project lifecycle
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/project-lifecycle.md (Codex-verified). Tested-holds (strong): legal-transition allow-list + phase-close fresh-PASS gate (rejects prose-PASS/untyped/FAIL; freshness fails CLOSED on git failure; executable phase closes only on local_execution; ci_execution/live_boundary forgery rejected) all pinned by lifecycle-advance.spec.js (18); status reader degrades to unknown; app fail-closed (illegal transitions unreachable, crash never advances). Residues: forgeable local last-verification.txt = the SAME owner-accepted forged-PASS/origin-seam residue (signing=over-governance); minor stale-PASS test-coverage note. No control built

slices.title: External dependency/tool availability & failure behavior
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/external-dependency-availability.md (Codex-verified). Tested-holds (strong): every dependency on the current critical path (worker, Codex, gh, CI, git/remote, npm) degrades to honest UNKNOWN/error, proven never to fake a green (tool-preflight/boundary/ci-status/release-gate/check-branch-protection/sync/fi5/fi6 specs). One disclosed residue: codex-verify-watcher.ps1 (retired advisor track, owner-run) invokes codex bare with no timeout -> silent stop, never a false PASS; recommend timed-job/guard IF ever put unattended, else retire. No control built

slices.title: Multi-project scaffolding & parity
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/scaffolding-parity.md (PR #29, Codex-verified). Tested-holds: scaffold-kit.spec.js (34) re-run green this session — anti-drift guards derived from main.js prove every app-invoked script + state-config travels (forgotten file fails the build), config re-scoped per project, fresh scaffold passes its own doctor. No control built; one untested link (.gitignore content in child) disclosed as a cheap recommended follow-up

slices.title: Retirement, migration & data export/decommissioning
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/retirement-migration-export.md (Codex-verified). Tested-holds, low consequence: data is 100% open formats (JSON/JSONL/Markdown/git) in the project folder; extractability real+tested (scaffold-kit, idea-014 kernel audit); registry self-prunes deleted folders (no lock-in). Residues (low): no explicit export/remove/archive button (structurally unnecessary -- data is just files); one absolute-path migration friction confined to the RETIRED advisor track (new scaffolded projects omit project-state.json). No control built

slices.title: Memory & knowledge
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/memory-knowledge.md (Codex-verified). Tested-holds for what's built (summaries fail closed on junk/never fabricate; recall is recall-safe + verbatim-quote anti-hallucination, chat-summary/chat-recall specs; handoff deterministic + refuses to over-report a forgeable verdict). The one gap -- no PROACTIVE 'don't repeat mistakes' enforcement (knowledge is pull-based) -- is a DELIBERATE accepted-residue: DECISION-008 (no fake intelligence) + summarize-routing-log 'permanently declined (pcc-postbrr-002)'. Named for owner acceptance. No control built (would fabricate the intelligence DECISION-008 forbids)

slices.title: Communication contracts
slices.evidence: audit complete + Codex-verified; channels 1/3/4 machinery built (PR #16, #18) + parity-proven (scaffold-kit.spec.js); 2/5/6/7 assessed with disclosed gaps (channel 6 measurement deferred) — see docs/specs/communication-contracts.md grid

slices.title: Repo & supply-chain security
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/repo-supply-chain-security.md (Codex-verified). Tested-holds: verified DIRECTLY this audit -- least-privilege permissions (contents:read), both actions SHA-pinned (40-char), npm audit --audit-level=high gates with NO continue-on-error, npm ci from committed lockfile, ZERO production deps, single hardened workflow, judge-from-trusted-main not PR-re-derivable. Residue: ci.yml-self-edit = already owner-accepted ADR-0008 O1/O2 boundary (not a code hole). No control built

slices.title: Worker operation & tooling conventions
slices.evidence: audit grid docs/audit/worker-operation-tooling.md (Codex-verified). Tested-holds: supported claude -p spawn, session-hijack UUID fix, read-only/build profile (authority-tool-profile.spec pinned), orphan-kill, stream-json validated vs real capture, model fallback-to-default + honest hard-fail. Two disclosed bounded residues (recommendations, not built): parseStreamJson fails QUIET (empty reply) if a future CC update changes the stream-json shape (bounded to attachments path); oneShotWorker keeps an un-shared copy of the read-only deny-list (drift risk) -> recommend dedup to the shared constant. No control built
